questions.reason:
Using the Value Putting method, let's assume a standard right triangle with Perpendicular (P)=3, Base (B)=4, Hypotenuse (H)=5. Thus, \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \) and \( \sec\theta = \frac{5}{4} \).
Expression: \( \frac{\frac{3}{4} + \frac{5}{4} - 1}{\frac{3}{4} - \frac{5}{4} + 1} = \frac{\frac{8}{4} - 1}{-\frac{2}{4} + 1} = \frac{2 - 1}{-0.5 + 1} = \frac{1}{0.5} = 2 \).
Now, check the options. Option (a): \( \frac{1 + \sin\theta}{\cos\theta} = \frac{1 + \frac{3}{5}}{\frac{4}{5}} = \frac{\frac{8}{5}}{\frac{4}{5}} = 2 \). It matches.
questions.reason_hi:
मान रखने की विधि (Value Putting) का उपयोग करते हुए, एक समकोण त्रिभुज मान लें जिसमें लंब(P)=3, आधार(B)=4, कर्ण(H)=5 हो। अतः, \( \tan\theta = \frac{3}{4} \) और \( \sec\theta = \frac{5}{4} \)।
व्यंजक: \( \frac{\frac{3}{4} + \frac{5}{4} - 1}{\frac{3}{4} - \frac{5}{4} + 1} = \frac{\frac{8}{4} - 1}{-\frac{2}{4} + 1} = \frac{2 - 1}{-0.5 + 1} = \frac{1}{0.5} = 2 \)।
अब विकल्पों की जाँच करें। विकल्प (a): \( \frac{1 + \sin\theta}{\cos\theta} = \frac{1 + \frac{3}{5}}{\frac{4}{5}} = \frac{\frac{8}{5}}{\frac{4}{5}} = 2 \)। यह मेल खाता है।

questions.reason:
Assume P=3, B=4, H=5. Then \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \) and \( \csc\theta = \frac{5}{3} \).
Expression: \( \frac{\frac{4}{3} + \frac{5}{3} - 1}{\frac{4}{3} - \frac{5}{3} + 1} = \frac{\frac{9}{3} - 1}{-\frac{1}{3} + 1} = \frac{3 - 1}{\frac{2}{3}} = \frac{2}{\frac{2}{3}} = 3 \).
Checking options with \( \cos\theta = \frac{4}{5} \) and \( \sin\theta = \frac{3}{5} \):
Option (c): \( \frac{1 + \cos\theta}{\sin\theta} = \frac{1 + \frac{4}{5}}{\frac{3}{5}} = \frac{\frac{9}{5}}{\frac{3}{5}} = 3 \). Matches.
questions.reason_hi:
मान लें P=3, B=4, H=5। तब \( \cot\theta = \frac{4}{3} \) और \( \csc\theta = \frac{5}{3} \) होगा।
व्यंजक: \( \frac{\frac{4}{3} + \frac{5}{3} - 1}{\frac{4}{3} - \frac{5}{3} + 1} = \frac{\frac{9}{3} - 1}{-\frac{1}{3} + 1} = \frac{3 - 1}{\frac{2}{3}} = \frac{2}{\frac{2}{3}} = 3 \)।
\( \cos\theta = \frac{4}{5} \) और \( \sin\theta = \frac{3}{5} \) रखकर विकल्पों की जाँच करें:
विकल्प (c): \( \frac{1 + \cos\theta}{\sin\theta} = \frac{1 + \frac{4}{5}}{\frac{3}{5}} = \frac{\frac{9}{5}}{\frac{3}{5}} = 3 \)। मेल खाता है।

questions.reason:
Since \( \sin\theta = \frac{P}{H} \), \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} \), and \( 1 = \frac{H}{H} \), we can substitute P, B, H directly into the numerator and denominator by multiplying by H.
Expression becomes \( \frac{P - B + H}{P + B - H} \).
Using P=3, B=4, H=5: \( \frac{3 - 4 + 5}{3 + 4 - 5} = \frac{4}{2} = 2 \).
Checking options: \( \sec\theta + \tan\theta = \frac{5}{4} + \frac{3}{4} = \frac{8}{4} = 2 \). Option (d) matches.
questions.reason_hi:
चूँकि \( \sin\theta = \frac{P}{H} \), \( \cos\theta = \frac{B}{H} \), और \( 1 = \frac{H}{H} \) है, हम H से गुणा करके सीधे अंश और हर में P, B, H मान रख सकते हैं।
व्यंजक \( \frac{P - B + H}{P + B - H} \) बन जाता है।
P=3, B=4, H=5 का उपयोग करने पर: \( \frac{3 - 4 + 5}{3 + 4 - 5} = \frac{4}{2} = 2 \)।
विकल्पों की जाँच: \( \sec\theta + \tan\theta = \frac{5}{4} + \frac{3}{4} = \frac{8}{4} = 2 \)। विकल्प (d) मेल खाता है।

विकल्प जाँचें: विकल्प (d) \( \csc\theta + \cot\theta = \frac{5}{3} + \frac{4}{3} = \frac{9}{3} = 3 \)।

questions.reason:
Using P=3, B=4, H=5, so \( \csc\theta = \frac{5}{3} \).
Expression: \( \frac{\frac{5}{3}}{\frac{5}{3} - 1} + \frac{\frac{5}{3}}{\frac{5}{3} + 1} = \frac{\frac{5}{3}}{\frac{2}{3}} + \frac{\frac{5}{3}}{\frac{8}{3}} = \frac{5}{2} + \frac{5}{8} = \frac{20}{8} + \frac{5}{8} = \frac{25}{8} \).
Check options: \( \sec\theta = \frac{5}{4} \), so \( 2\sec^2\theta = 2 \times \left(\frac{25}{16}\right) = \frac{25}{8} \). Option (d) matches.

questions.reason:

Using P=3, B=4, H=5: \( \left[\frac{3}{4} + \frac{4}{3}\right]^2 = \left[\frac{9+16}{12}\right]^2 = \left[\frac{25}{12}\right]^2 = \frac{625}{144} \).

Option (a): \( \frac{1}{\cos A} - \tan A = \sec A - \tan A = \frac{5}{4} - \frac{3}{4} = \frac{2}{4} = \frac{1}{2} \). Matches exactly.
